jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Borosil
jsonLd.description:
We at Borosil are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Thane. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Borosil:
Borosil is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Borosil!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
